title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master the art of user interface and experience design using Figma, wireframing, and prototyping.

title: Python for Data Science & Machine Learning
description: Dive deep into data analysis, visualization, and machine learning using Python, Pandas, and Scikit-learn.

title: Digital Marketing & SEO Strategy
description: Learn modern digital marketing strategies including SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, and analytics.

title: React & Next.js — The Complete Guide
description: Build production-ready web apps with React 18, Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Understand the core concepts of cybersecurity, ethical hacking, network security, and risk management.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner to Solutions Architect
description: Go from zero to AWS certified — covering EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, VPC, and cloud architecture best practices.

title: Graphic Design with Adobe Illustrator
description: Create stunning logos, icons, and brand identities from scratch using Adobe Illustrator's powerful vector tools.
